title: The Bitten Peach
description: The UK’s Pan-Asian cabaret collective, The Bitten Peach takes over Brighton Fringe for one night only! Devour the forbidden fruit and step into a world of dazzling drag and electrifying burlesque. Expect a riot of colour, culture, and camp as our all-star line-up serves up high-energy numbers, heartfelt storytelling, and a generous helping of cheeky Peachy charm. Whether you’re a cabaret connoisseur or a first-time Fringe-goer, this is a night of joy, celebration, and unapologetic Asian excellence you won’t want to miss!
content_warnings: Cabaret, drag & burlesque - this show contains partial nudity
